Description: Report each rating grade used in the reporting entity's internal risk rating system.
Allowable Values: Free text indicating the internal risk rating grade. Collectively, Internal Risk Rating defines the set of allowable values for Field 10 on Schedule H.1 and the portion of Field 15 associated with the internal risk rating code on Schedule H.2.

Description: Provide a brief description of the internal risk rating.
Allowable Values: Free text describing the internal risk rating.

Description: Provide the minimum probability of default associated with the Internal Risk Rating reported in Field 1.
Allowable Values: Express as a decimal to 7 decimal places, e.g., 50% is 0.5000000. Use decimal format; do not use scientific notation. Optionally report 'NA' if not reported on H.1 or H.2 during the reporting quarter.

Description: Provide the maximum probability of default associated with the Internal Risk Rating reported in Field 1.
Allowable Values: Express as a decimal to 7 decimal places, e.g., 50% is 0.5000000. Use decimal format; do not use scientific notation. Optionally report 'NA' if not reported on H.1 or H.2 during the reporting quarter.

Description: Indicate the calculation method used to determine the associated probabilities of default reported in Fields 3 and 4.
Allowable Values: 1. Through the cycle; 2. Point in time; 3. Hybrid
